title: I-69 Ohio River Crossing work on track ahead of 2027 bridge build
description:

description:

title: Fourth of July cookout prices see slight decrease this year
description:

title: Carmel students win high school entrepreneurship competition
description:

title: Vera Bradley moving corporate headquarters to Electric Works
description:
Vera Bradley Inc., which currently operates out of a 190,000-square-foot facility in nearby Roanoke, has signed a lease to occupy approximately 40,000 square feet at Electric Works.

title: New Indiana utility commission chair says agency to stay impartial after shakeup
description:
The new top Indiana utility regulator said on Wednesday that the governor will not be involved in agency decisions, despite a recent leadership shakeup.

title: Environmental groups file lawsuit over air permit renewal at U.S. Steel plant in Gary
description:

title: Bluffton cuts ribbon on Wells Community Aquatic Park
description:
Officials in Bluffton cut the ribbon Tuesday on the new Wells Community Aquatic Park, a project that was born out of a need to replace an aging community pool.

title: Natural Resources Commission members resign, blame top-down decision making
description: Two members of the Indiana Natural Resources Commission have resigned, blaming Gov. Mike Braun’s administration for “stifling” citizen input and curtailing the board’s role working with the Department of Natural Resource
